            cell [e137] [cursor=pointer]
              generic "Complete: ```json { \"content\": \"In the context of SPARTA technique REC-0004.01 (Flight Termination), the related control ST0001 (Reconnaissance) involves threat actors gathering information about the vehicle's flight termination system to plan future attacks. The related control CM0001 (Protect Sensitive Information) addresses this by ensuring that mission-sensitive design and operations information, such as details about the flight termination system, are identified, properly classified, and protected with appropriate access controls. This limits the attacker's ability to obtain critical information needed for reconnaissance and subsequent exploitation, as evidenced by the QRA stating that CM0001 ensures 'mission sensitive design/operations information (e.g., fault management approach)' is 'identified and properly classified' and access-controlled.\", \"citations\": [\"REC-0004.01\", \"ST0001\", \"CM0001\"], \"confidence\": \"high\", \"caveats\": [] } ```" [e138] [cursor=pointer]
              generic "rel::tech_related_controls::REC-0002.03::ST0001::CM0001 • SPARTA Relationship • create-evidence-case-adjudication-relationship_pooled_resume_after160_accepted_20260427T181734Z-128" [e139] [cursor=pointer]

            cell "deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3-0324-TEE" [e150] [cursor=pointer]
          row [e151] [cursor=pointer]
            cell [e152] [cursor=pointer]
              generic "Complete: ```json { \"content\": \"Within SPARTA technique EX-0002 (Position, Navigation, and Timing (PNT) Geofencing), control ST0004 (Execution) relates to control CM0032 (On-board Intrusion Detection & Prevention) by ensuring that malicious code execution attempts, which may be triggered by specific geographic or orbital locations, are detected and prevented. EX-0002 monitors the spacecraft's position and timing to prevent location-based malware triggers, while CM0032 provides the on-board capability to detect and respond to such execution attempts. This combination ensures that any malicious code execution (ST0004) is identified and mitigated by the intrusion detection/prevention system (CM0032) before it can affect the spacecraft's operations.\", \"citations\": [\"EX-0002\", \"ST0004\", \"CM0032\"], \"confidence\": \"high\", \"caveats\": [\"The evidence case does not provide specific examples of how ST0004 and CM0032 interact in practice, only their general roles in relation to EX-0002.\"] } ```" [e153] [cursor=pointer]
              generic "rel::tech_related_controls::REC-0008.04::ST0001::CM0001 • SPARTA Relationship • create-evidence-case-adjudication-relationship_pooled_resume_after160_accepted_20260427T181734Z-128" [e154] [cursor=pointer]
                generic "rel::tech_related_controls::REC-0008.04::ST0001::CM0001" [e155] [cursor=pointer]
                generic "create-qras • SPARTA Relationship • create-evidence-case-adjudication-relationship_pooled_resume_aft..." [e156] [cursor=pointer]

                generic "```json { \"content\": \"Within SPARTA technique EX-0002 (Position, Navigation, and Timing (PNT) Geofen..." [e161]
            cell "Complete: grounded response accepted" [e162] [cursor=pointer]
              button "Open full evidence case for rel::tech_related_controls::REC-0008.04::ST0001::CM0001" [e163] [cursor=pointer]
            cell "11569ms" [e164] [cursor=pointer]
            cell "deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3-0324-TEE" [e165] [cursor=pointer]
          row [e166] [cursor=pointer]
            cell [e167] [cursor=pointer]
              generic "Complete: ```json { \"content\": \"Within SPARTA technique REC-0008.04 (Business Relationships), the related control ST0001 (Reconnaissance) involves adversaries gathering information about the victim's business relationships to plan future operations. This directly relates to control CM0001 (Protect Sensitive Information) as CM0001 addresses the need to identify and properly classify mission-sensitive information and apply access controls to prevent unauthorized disclosure. The QRA evidence indicates that REC-0008.04 exploits vulnerabilities by gathering information about business relationships, which may have access to sensitive information, and CM0001 mitigates this by ensuring such information is classified and protected with access controls. Thus, ST0001's reconnaissance activities are countered by CM0001's protective measures.\", \"citations\": [\"REC-0008.04\", \"ST0001\", \"CM0001\"], \"confidence\": \"high\", \"caveats\": [] } ```" [e168] [cursor=pointer]

            cell [e182] [cursor=pointer]
              generic "Complete: ```json { \"content\": \"Within SPARTA technique REC-0004 (Gather Launch Information), the related control ST0001 (Reconnaissance) describes the threat actor's intent to gather information for planning future operations. The related control CM0001 (Protect Sensitive Information) directly counters this by identifying, classifying, and applying access controls to mission-sensitive design and operations information, as evidenced in the QRA. This relationship shows that CM0001 serves as a protective measure against the reconnaissance activities described in ST0001 by limiting access to critical launch information.\", \"citations\": [\"REC-0004\", \"ST0001\", \"CM0001\"], \"confidence\": \"high\", \"caveats\": [\"The evidence does not provide specific examples of how CM0001 is implemented in practice against ST0001 activities.\"] } ```" [e183] [cursor=pointer]
